CREATE TABLE WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (ID INT PRIMARY KEY, RES_CONTENT TEXT);
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (ID, RES_CONTENT) VALUES (1, '<body>This place is filled with knowledge.</body>');
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (ID, RES_CONTENT) VALUES (2, '<body>Knowledge is the key to success.</body>');
INSERT INTO WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES (ID, RES_CONTENT) VALUES (3, 'Place the knowledge in the proper context.');

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'place and knowledge') do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('place', 'knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'knowledge') AND ID < 3 do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('knowledge'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'place') OR contains(RES_CONTENT, 'success') do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('place', 'success'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM (SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'knowledge') UNION SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'success')) AS combined WHERE ID = 1 do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('knowledge', 'success'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE ID IN (SELECT ID FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'place')) do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('place'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };

SELECT RES_CONTENT FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE ID NOT IN (SELECT ID FROM WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES WHERE contains(RES_CONTENT, 'knowledge')) do { http_value(search_excerpt(vector('success'), cast(RES_CONTENT as varchar), 200000, 90, 200, 'b', 1), 'P'); };
